prompt_text:
### Demographics: 77-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 13 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Mild Cognitive Impairment with early Dementia
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (mother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 3 years ago; 5 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~3.8 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Donepezil (10 mg nightly)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 66.6 kg; Height 164.2 cm; BMI 24.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 142/78 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.5%; 9 months ago 8.2%; 6 months ago 7.7%; 3 months ago 7.2%; current 6.3%), FPG (12 months ago 220mg/dL; 9 months ago 185mg/dL; 6 months ago 207mg/dL; 3 months ago 190mg/dL; current 160mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 70.2kg; 9 months ago 68.7kg; 6 months ago 67.8kg; 3 months ago 62.6kg; current 66.6kg), Height (12 months ago 164.2cm; 9 months ago 164.2cm; 6 months ago 164.2cm; 3 months ago 164.2cm; current 164.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 23.0kg/m²; current 24.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 142mmHg; 9 months ago 140mmHg; 6 months ago 143mmHg; 3 months ago 141mmHg; current 142mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 76mmHg; 9 months ago 74mmHg; 6 months ago 77mmHg; 3 months ago 78mmHg; current 78mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 22U/L; 9 months ago 26U/L; 6 months ago 20U/L; 3 months ago 25U/L; current 24U/L), AST (12 months ago 30U/L; 9 months ago 20U/L; 6 months ago 19U/L; 3 months ago 19U/L; current 25U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.2mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.3mg/dL; current 0.3mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 40mL/min/1.73m²; current 38mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 134mg/g; 9 months ago 122mg/g; 6 months ago 112mg/g; 3 months ago 111mg/g; current 130mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 88mg/dL; 9 months ago 81mg/dL; 6 months ago 81mg/dL; 3 months ago 87mg/dL; current 84mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 57mg/dL; 9 months ago 56mg/dL; 6 months ago 57mg/dL; 3 months ago 59mg/dL; current 58mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 136mg/dL; 9 months ago 133mg/dL; 6 months ago 150mg/dL; 3 months ago 134mg/dL; current 142mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.2g/dL; current 10.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
